_meta.invalidFallback: Used only when the model marks an issue invalid but does not provide suggestedComment/reason.
_meta.missingHeader: Used only in fallback invalid comments before listing missing fields from the model.

closeInstruction: This issue will be closed automatically. You can edit it using the guidance above, then reopen it to trigger another check.
validFallback: This issue has passed the template check.
invalidFallback: This issue is missing required template information.
labelModeInstruction: Please edit the issue with the missing information. It will be checked again after it is reopened.
manualReviewConfirmation: Manual review requested. This issue will no longer be processed by the AI template checker.
maxChecksReached:
This issue has already been checked {{maxChecks}} times for the "{{templateName}}" template.

The automatic template check will not run again for this issue. Please ask a maintainer to review it manually.
unmatchedTemplate:
This issue does not have a label that maps to a configured issue template, so the AI template check could not run.

Expected one of these template labels: {{expectedLabels}}.

Please create the issue from one of the repository issue forms, or ask a maintainer to add the correct template label.
